overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a Slytherin student exploring the castle interior. The character descends grand staircases, walks through Gothic corridors with marble busts and stained glass windows, and enters a Defence Against the Dark Arts classroom with a large skeleton suspended from the ceiling.

agents.ego_description: walking through a room with a large unicorn tapestry and approaching a grand wooden staircase

dark wooden cabinet with glass doors
ornate wooden staircase with carved railings

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a castle room featuring a prominent unicorn tapestry on the far wall. The character walks across patterned marble flooring toward a grand wooden staircase, transitioning from the open room into the stairwell area.

segments.scene_description: The character descends a grand wooden staircase within an enclosed stone tower. A white marble statue stands at the landing as the camera turns to continue downward, passing ornate gothic railings and thick stone pillars.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow corridor lined with white marble busts on pedestals. The corridor features ornate wall paneling and leads toward a large stained glass window at the far end, with a distant student visible walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper balcony with large stained glass windows overlooking lower levels

events.description: entering upper balcony area with bright stained glass windows
ascending the final steps of the staircase alongside the balcony railing

agents.ego_description: climbing a staircase alongside an ornate balcony railing, passing other students on the upper level

notable_agents.action: student in black robes with green trim walking up the stairs ahead

entered.detail: decorative stone balustrade overlooking the lower floor
dark stone statue of a robed figure on a pedestal

segments.scene_description: The character ascends to an upper balcony level featuring ornate stone railings and large stained glass windows that cast colored light onto the floor. The space opens up with gothic archways, and other students are visible walking along the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with tall stained glass windows leading to classroom entrance

events.description: entering the final corridor approach to the classroom
slowing down as approaching the wooden classroom door

agents.ego_description: walking along a corridor with tall stained glass windows toward a classroom door, following other students

notable_agents.action: group of students walking ahead toward the classroom entrance

entered.detail: large wooden door with metal studs leading to the classroom
framed portraits hanging on the stone walls
tall narrow windows with gothic arches and stained glass

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a corridor lined with tall gothic windows and framed portraits, following other students toward a large wooden door. The stained glass windows illuminate the stone walls with natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: Defence Against the Dark Arts classroom with skeleton suspended from ceiling

UI text appears indicating '3:30pm Defence Against the Dark Arts'

segments.scene_description: The character enters a large, high-ceilinged classroom with wooden floors and tall gothic windows. A massive skeleton hangs suspended from the ceiling above rows of wooden desks where students sit. The UI indicates this is the Defence Against the Dark Arts classroom at 3:30pm.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through the Gothic interior of a castle, moving from private chambers through ornate corridors and finally into a specialized classroom. It begins in a room featuring a unicorn tapestry, with the camera gliding across patterned marble flooring toward a grand wooden staircase. As the character descends through an enclosed stone tower past a white marble statue, the scene shifts into a narrow corridor lined with marble busts and leads toward a distant stained glass window. The camera then ascends to an upper balcony where colored light filters through gothic archways, following a path of framed portraits and other students toward a large wooden door. Finally, the movement culminates as the character enters the high-ceilinged Defence Against the Dark Arts classroom, where a massive skeleton hangs suspended above rows of wooden desks.
